reviews.comment:
Deja bastante desepcionado a un socio de 45 años de antiguedad.Que paso con el viejo espiritu del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It leaves a 45-year member quite disappointed. What happened to the old spirit of the ACA?

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, muy buenos desayunos,muy económico. Recomendable 100%.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, great breakfasts, very affordable. 100% recommended.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Los fines de semana se suele poner más lenta la atención por la afluencia de clientes. Amplio surtido.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Service tends to slow down on weekends due to the influx of customers. Wide selection.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Hemos ido en reiteradas veces y muchas de ellas no funciona el descuento q te brinda y te ves obligado abonar de otra manera . Si solucionan eso , el servicio es bueno

(Translated by Google)
We've been there several times, and often the discount they offer doesn't work, forcing us to pay another way. If they fix that, the service is good.
